description: Welcome to Derby Mews, a family-friendly community offering comfort and exceptional value. This rare 2-storey, 3 bedroom, 3 bathroom townhome features a functional layout with spacious main floor living. Sliding doors lead to a private backyard, perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The home was fully renovated in 2021, including a new kitchen with built-in cabinetry, quartz countertops, flooring, bathrooms, and lighting throughout. Major updates include a new roof and furnace (2021), hot water tank (2024), washer and dryer (2023) and a 240V outlet for EV charging. Air conditioning adds extra comfort during the warmer months, making this move-in-ready home easy to enjoy. Ideal for buyers looking for a welcoming community close to everyday conveniences in beautiful Walnut Grove.
